Nav.tagline: Short films of the greatest stories
Nav.contactBlurb: Ideas, partnerships, or something worth making. We're here for it.

Film.transcriptUnavailable: Transcript content unavailable for this language.

Nominate.title: Nominate.
Nominate.description: Know a story the world needs to hear? A piece of history. A fictional adventure. A forgotten legend. Nominate it. Your name goes on the film. Bragging rights included.
Nominate.storyPlaceholder: A few words or a sprawling saga, write it here.
Nominate.disclaimer: We review everything in good faith. Nominations are simply pointers—we may already be developing similar ideas. They don't create ownership or compensation, but we take every submission seriously.
Nominate.submitError: Database communication dropped. Please try again later.
Nominate.successBody: Thank you for sending this story our way. We'll review it with care. If it feels like a fit, we'll be in touch.

Partner.description: We work with brands, studios, and individuals who believe stories shape people. From original films to cultural partnerships, we collaborate to bring meaningful ideas to life.

Footer.blurb: Fjorr is home to short cinematic films about the world's greatest stories. The stories are intended for cultural, educational, and creative purposes.
Footer.emailInvalid: That email looks a bit off.
